diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..e169545 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -1,6 +1,23 @@
 def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
+    '''
+    Return a preview of the text truncated to the specified limit.
+    
+    If the text is longer than the limit, an ellipsis ('...') is appended
+    to indicate truncation. If there is not enough room to include the ellipsis,
+    the text is simply cut to the limit without an ellipsis.
+    '''
     if limit < 0:
-        raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
+        raise ValueError('limit must be non-negative')
+
+    # If the text fits within the limit, return as is
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+
+    # The ellipsis takes 3 characters. If the limit is too small to accommodate
+    # the ellipsis, return the truncated text without an ellipsis.
+    ellipsis = '...'
+    if limit <= len(ellipsis):
+        return text[:limit]
+
+    # Otherwise, fit as many characters as possible before the ellipsis.
+    return text[:limit - len(ellipsis)] + ellipsis
